Group of at least 8 pecan trees. Plenty of nuts on the ground. Some trees are better than others. Access: Public.

Saw people picking up pecans here the other day.  They parked on the service road.  I think it is close enough the parking lot though that you can just part there. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-November.
Mexican plum tree, lots of fruit. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: September-December.
